description: Destroy tool. Pins the private-image-id rejection, the confirm-alone destroy gate, and the bypassed DELETE.

cases.name: rejects missing image_id
cases.expect_error: image_id must be a non-empty string

cases.name: confirm alone hits the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_image_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)
